text: 21. DEFECTIVE WORK AND CLAIMS: No payment made under this  subcontract  shall  be  construed  to  be  an  acceptance  of defective or non-conforming work, improper materials, or quantities of materials. Payments otherwise due may be withheld by Contractor on account of defective work not remedied, claims filed, evidence indicating probability of filing of claims, failure of Subcontractor to make payments properly to its subcontractors of for material, equipment or labor, failure of Subcontractor to provide sufficient labor, materials or equipment or otherwise comply with the schedule for the work, failure of Subcontractor to abide by the terms of this subcontract, or a reasonable doubt that the subcontract can be completed for the Subcontract Amount
